items.title: Iran considering US proposal to end war, official says
items.summary: The White House reportedly believes it could be closing in on a 14-point memorandum of understanding with Iran.

items.title: Trump's hopes for an Iran peace deal come with caveats
items.summary: There are signs of fresh momentum to end the war, but Trump himself has injected a note of caution.

items.title: Israel strikes Beirut for first time since Hezbollah ceasefire
items.summary: Israel says it targeted a senior Hezbollah figure in the capital, the first strike of its kind since mid-April.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 交出濃縮鈾！美媒：川普估1週內解決伊朗問題
items.summary: 美國福斯新聞（Fox News）主播拜爾（Bret Baier）6日表示，他不久前曾與總統川普通話，川普預計可能在1週內達成協議，結束與伊朗的戰爭。美國媒體Axios報導，美國與...…

items.title: 精準打擊！  美軍「超級大黃蜂」戰機發射機砲 癱瘓伊朗油輪
items.summary: 美國目前仍對伊朗實施海上封鎖，負責掌管中東與中亞美軍部隊的美國中央司令部（CENTCOM）6日發文指出，一架從「林肯號」航空母艦起飛的F/A-18E/F「超級大黃蜂」戰機，在6日...…

items.title: 稱與伊朗談得不錯 川普：訪中前有望達成協議
items.summary: 美國與伊朗僵局未解，美國總統川普6日表示，在過去24小時內，美國與伊朗進行了非常良好的會談，川普聲稱：「我們很有可能達成協議。」  綜合外媒報導，川普6日在白宮橢圓形辦公室向...…
